authors.author: David Ruis
David Ruis
Herr, deine Gnade, sie fällt auf mein Leben

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Mercy is falling, is falling, is falling. Mercy it falls like the sweet spring rain. Mercy is falling, is falling all over me.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Hey, oh, I receive Your mercy. Hey, oh, I receive Your grace. Hey, oh, I will dance forevermore.
